responses: To book an event, start by uploading an image of the event space. If you don't have one, you can use our AI to generate it. Once you send an offer to the planner, you’ll be notified once it’s accepted.
You will receive a confirmation email within 24 hours after your booking request.
Simply visit our booking page at /booking to start your event booking.
You will need to provide your personal details, event details, and a picture of the space if available.
You can select a new date after confirming your booking, but changes may depend on availability.
You will need to provide an image of the room or event space. If you don’t have one, we can generate one for you.
If you don’t have an image, our AI can generate one based on your description.
Share your event image with event planners to receive quotes and decoration offers.
Once your event planner accepts your offer, you will receive confirmation along with next steps.
Once you submit the booking form, you'll be guided to the confirmation email and booking details.
If you don’t have an image, our AI tool will assist in creating a visual for your event.
You will receive confirmation and further instructions within 24 hours.
After submitting the booking, you’ll get a confirmation email with details within a day.
Once the offer is accepted, you'll receive a confirmation email and event details.
Save the generated image and share it with the event planners for detailed offers and planning.
Once the event planner approves your booking, you will be notified and a confirmation will follow.
